title: Colorful Canines
description: Makes dyed wolf armor fully colored!
body:
A small pack that makes dyed wolf armor completely colored, making it look cleaner and less busy when combined with the new wolf variants.

![Ashen and snowy wolves with colorful armor](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9ae12459491f4b28c7cb42edffbf535b396eb2ce.png)![Three end-themed armored wolves](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/aa7435dc3bdf5dda9bb0ce05b7f2a928982a290a.png)![Spotted wolves with colorful armor](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0fd4f0097044f268713d060d3e0a8e5985a75674.png)
